text:
Inventory update! 🎒✨ We just dropped some major loot for your creative kit.

🎤 ElevenLabs is here for the yappers (top-tier TTS)
🎬 Grok Video + Imagen 4 for the visionaries
🌊 Plus, we smoothed out the scroll & fixed the gateway so your flow stays uninterrupted.

No gatekeeping, just better tools. Go build something wild. 🐝💛

Link in bio to try the new models!
